http.server/BaseHTTPRequestHandler/addre.name: address_string
http.server/BaseHTTPRequestHandler/addre.description: Returns the client address. Changed in version 3.3: Previously, a name lookup was performed. To avoid name resolution delays, it now always returns the IP address.
